parameters.command:
=echo '{{ JSON.stringify( $json.data ) }}' | python3 /home/victor/.n8n-files/alarmMonitorDBn8n.py \
  --influx-url    {{ $('Extract from File').item.json.data.INFLUX_CONFIG.INFLUX_URL }} \
  --influx-token  {{ $('Extract from File').item.json.data.INFLUX_CONFIG.INFLUX_TOKEN }} \
  --influx-org    {{ $('Extract from File').item.json.data.INFLUX_CONFIG.INFLUX_ORG }} \
  --influx-bucket {{ $('Extract from File').item.json.data.INFLUX_CONFIG.INFLUX_BUCKET }} \
  --log-dir       ~/.n8n-files/logs

=echo '{{ $json.stdout }}' | python3 /home/victor/.n8n-files/alarmNotifiern8n.py \
  --smtp-host     {{ $('Extract from File').item.json.data.MAIL_CONFIG.SMTP_HOST }} \
  --smtp-port     {{ $('Extract from File').item.json.data.MAIL_CONFIG.SMTP_PORT }} \
  --smtp-user     {{ $('Extract from File').item.json.data.MAIL_CONFIG.SMTP_USER }} \
  --smtp-password {{ $('Extract from File').item.json.data.MAIL_CONFIG.SMTP_PASSWORD }} \
  --email-from    "{{ $('Extract from File').item.json.data.MAIL_CONFIG.EMAIL_FROM }}" \
  --log-dir       {{ $('Extract from File').item.json.data.LOG_DIRECTORY }}

=echo '{{ JSON.stringify( $json.data ) }}' | python3 /home/victor/.n8n-files/alarmMonitorDBn8n.py \
